OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: Dataload

omniProcessElements.name: DeleteDuplicateSpecialty
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(%SpecialityToDelete%)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "HealthcareProviderSpecialty", "Id" : "%SpecialityToDelete:Id%", "AllOrNone" : true } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: DeleteDuplicateTaxonomy
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(%TaxonomyToDelete%)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "HealthcareProviderTaxonomy", "Id" : "%TaxonomyToDelete:Id%", "AllOrNone" : true } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: DRLoadBoardCertification
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(%ClinicianBoardCertification%) && %UserChanges:IsBoardCertChanged% && ISNOTBLANK(%ClinicianBoardCertification:status%)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "UpdateResp", "sendJSONPath" : "ClinicianBoardCertification", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "LoadBoardCertificationDM", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: DRLoadClinicianSpecialty
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(%SpecialtyListTobeUpdated%) && (%UserChanges:IsPrimarySpecialtyChanged% || %UserChanges:IsPractSpecialtyChanged%)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "UpdateResp", "sendJSONPath" : "SpecialtyListTobeUpdated", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRInsertHealthCareSpeciality", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: DRLoadClinicianTaxonomy
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(%ClinicianTaxonomy%) && %UserChanges:IsTaxonomyChanged% && ISNOTBLANK(%ClinicianTaxonomy:TaxonomyName%)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "UpdateResp", "sendJSONPath" : "ClinicianTaxonomy", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRLoadHealthCareProviderTaxonomy", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: DRLoadClinicianUpdate
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(%Clinician%) && %UserChanges:IsClinicianChanged%", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "UpdateResp", "sendJSONPath" : "Clinician", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRLoadClinicianUpdate", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: DRLoadMedicalLicense
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(%ClinicianMedicalLicense:medicalLicenseList%) && %UserChanges:IsMedicalLicenseChanged%", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "UpdateResp", "sendJSONPath" : "ClinicianMedicalLicense", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "LoadMedicalLicenseDM", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: DRLoadPersonEducation
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(%ClinicianEducation:Program%) && %UserChanges:IsPersonEducationChanged%", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "UpdateResp", "sendJSONPath" : "ClinicianEducation", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRLoadClinicianEducation", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction7", "disOnTplt" : false }
